title: Gongfu Wood Ear Delight
description: A herbal and gooey French dish featuring wood ear mushrooms that are high-protein-friendly and perfect for a solo dinner.

ingredients.name: Wood Ear Mushrooms
ingredients.notes: Soak in water for at least 30 minutes

ingredients.name: Dumplings
ingredients.notes: Regular meat or vegetarian, steamed or boiled as per preference

instructions: Prepare the wood ear mushrooms by soaking them in water for at least 30 minutes.
Soften the dumplings and prepare them according to your preference (steamed or boiled).
If desired, add a small amount of vegetable broth to enhance the flavor and soften the wood ear mushrooms.
Sauté the olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the softened dumplings and lightly sauté until heated through.
Add the soiled wood ear mushrooms into the pan with the dumplings. Cook for about 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally to combine all ingredients.
Finish by adding optional herbs for a pop of color and flavor.
Serve hot as your herbal and gooey French dish.
